hyperedges.label: HDR Imaging Research Cluster
hyperedges.rationale: These nodes collectively constitute the site's HDR imaging and luminance representation learning research strand, connected by shared topics, cross-links, and complementary contributions.

hyperedges.label: Embedded Vision Efficiency Cluster
hyperedges.rationale: These nodes form a coherent research and publication cluster focused on deploying efficient vision models on constrained hardware.

hyperedges.label: Teaching Courses Cluster
hyperedges.rationale: Both courses are taught by Dominique Ginhac and together form the undergraduate teaching portfolio represented on the site.

nodes.label: Configuration-Driven Content Architecture
nodes.rationale: All site content lives in src/config/ so content changes require no component edits — separation of data from presentation.

nodes.label: Link.astro UI Component
nodes.rationale: arrow=none auto-applies text-accent and inline display for inline prose links; group-hover:underline on inner span only so arrows never underline.

nodes.label: DG Brand App Icon (512x512 PWA Manifest Icon)
nodes.author: Dom Ginhac
nodes.description: 512x512 PNG web app manifest icon for the ginhac.dev personal academic website. Displays the 'DG' monogram logo: a large dark navy-blue letter D overlapping with a light steel-blue letter G rendered in an open circular stroke style. The two letterforms partially overlap, with the G's circular arc intersecting the D. Background is white/transparent. The D contains a small bracket-like mark (suggesting code or academic motif) inside its counter. Minimal, modern, typographic mark.
nodes.norm_label: dg brand app icon (512x512 pwa manifest icon)

nodes.label: Site Favicon 96x96 — DG Monogram Logo
nodes.author: d0m G
nodes.description: 96×96px PNG favicon for the ginhac.dev website. Displays a two-letter monogram 'DG' on a dark near-black square background. The 'D' is rendered in white and the 'G' in a muted steel-blue (accent-soft tone), forming a compact, modern wordmark. The letters are set in a clean geometric sans-serif typeface with a slight overlap between the two glyphs. The mark matches the brand SVG (dg-primary.svg) adapted for favicon use. Style is minimal, flat, and typographic — no gradients, no icons, no ornamentation.

properties.description: 192x192 PNG used as PWA web app manifest icon for home screen / app launcher

properties.design: geometric sans-serif letterforms, D on left overlapping G on right
properties.purpose: personal academic website brand identity for D. Ginhac

links.note: DG monogram serves as the site favicon/touch icon for iOS home screen bookmarks

links.description: PWA web app manifest icon at 512x512px, referenced in web manifest for installable progressive web app support

links.label: browser tab and bookmark favicon for ginhac.dev

links.note: The DG monogram is deployed as the browser favicon at public/favicon.svg
D shape uses fill color #0F172A (dark navy / hero-text token)
G arc uses stroke color #7BAFD4 (accent-soft token), stroke-width 8, no fill
The monogram includes a D letterform rendered as a dark navy (#0F172A) filled path with an inner cutout and corner bracket detail
The monogram includes a G letterform rendered as a light blue (#7BAFD4) partial circle arc with a horizontal crossbar stroke
Image is used as the featured/hero image for the Lumen luminance representation learning blog post

Interior office/research workspace with desk, laptop, office chair, bookshelves, and window overlooking a landscape with dramatic cloudy sky — likely the author's research office, used as visual context for the post

properties.concept: computer vision, visual representations, feature extraction, machine perception

properties.description: Close-up photograph of a human eye occupying the right half of the image
Glowing blue futuristic HUD / AR scanner overlay with bounding boxes and targeting reticles around the eye

properties.concept: multi-dimensional visual feature representation / descriptor space

properties.description: Circular progress/gauge element in the lower-left, typical of futuristic data dashboard UI
Scanner UI targets and highlights the eye, symbolising machine vision analysis of the human visual organ

links.label: uses attention to align with reference
reference features F2' directly to conv
D output added via skip S2

links.note: Two-exposure comparison illustrates why single LDR images cannot capture full dynamic range
Illustrates the core problem that HDR imaging solves
Same scene photographed at different exposure levels to demonstrate LDR limitations
LDR limitation is the motivation for HDR imaging techniques described in the post

properties.reason: v2 is the current homepage hero portrait per CLAUDE.md
